mapper.select: INSERT INTO PAYMENT_ATTEMPT_SEQ(POS_TRX, LAST_SEQ, UPDATED_AT) VALUES (#{posTrx}, 1, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) ON CONFLICT (POS_TRX) DO UPDATE SET LAST_SEQ = LAST_SEQ + 1, UPDATED_AT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP RETURNING LAST_SEQ;
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO PAYMENT_ATTEMPT (POS_TRX, ATTEMPT_SEQ, AMOUNT, CARD_BIN, CARD_LAST4, CARD_BRAND, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT) VALUES (#{attempt.posTrx}, #{attempt.attemptSeq}, #{attempt.amount}, #{attempt.cardBin}, #{attempt.cardLast4}, #{attempt.cardBrand}, #{attempt.createdAt}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
mapper.select: SELECT A.FINAL_STATUS AS finalStatus, A.APPROVAL_NO AS approvalNo, A.DECLINE_CODE AS declineCode, A.CARD_BIN AS cardBin, A.CARD_LAST4 AS cardLast4, A.ATTEMPT_SEQ AS attemptSeq, A.AMOUNT AS amount, A.VAN_TRX_ID AS vanTrxId from PAYMENT_ATTEMPT A WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.POS_TRX = #{posTrx} ORDER BY A.ATTEMPT_SEQ DESC LIMIT 1;

SELECT A.FINAL_STATUS AS finalStatus, A.APPROVAL_NO AS approvalNo, A.DECLINE_CODE AS declineCode, A.CARD_BIN AS cardBin, A.CARD_LAST4 AS cardLast4, A.ATTEMPT_SEQ AS attemptSeq, A.AMOUNT AS amount, A.VAN_TRX_ID AS vanTrxId FROM PAYMENT_ATTEMPT A WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.POS_TRX = #{posTrx} AND A.ATTEMPT_SEQ = #{attemptSeq};

UPDATE PAYMENT_ATTEMPT SET FINAL_STATUS = #{attempt.finalStatus}, APPROVAL_NO = #{attempt.approvalNo}, DECLINE_CODE = #{attempt.declineCode}, VAN_TRX_ID = #{attempt.vanTrxId}, UPDATED_AT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE POS_TRX = #{attempt.posTrx} AND ATTEMPT_SEQ = #{attempt.attemptSeq} AND FINAL_STATUS IS NULL RETURNING POS_TRX AS posTrx, ATTEMPT_SEQ AS attemptSeq, FINAL_STATUS AS finalStatus, APPROVAL_NO AS approvalNo, DECLINE_CODE AS declineCode, CARD_BIN as cardBin, CARD_LAST4 as cardLast4, VAN_TRX_ID AS vanTrxId;
